title: citrullus colocynthis subsp. stenotomus
intro: Citrullus colocynthis subsp. stenotomus, also known as the calotropis or bitter melon vine, is a plant species within the Cucurbitaceae family that is native to Africa and the Middle East. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and inflammation. The fruit of the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Citrullus colocynthis subsp. stenotomus are typically made from the fruit or leaves, and are often consumed as teas, extracts, or powders.
